*Laugh track* -- everyone must fake laugh after every answer for {rule_turns} rounds. No laugh = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: The laugh track is off. Thank God.

prompts.text: No saying any character names for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Showrunner. Everyone must get their approval before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must speak in a sitcom catchphrase before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Can't think of one? Extra sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must address each other by sitcom character names. Real names = 2 sips.
No one can say 'like' for {rule_turns} rounds. Every 'like' = 1 sip.
{player1} is the Critic. They rate every answer 1-10 for {rule_turns} rounds. Under 5 = take a sip.
{player1} is Thumbmaster. When they put their thumb on the table, last to notice takes 2 sips. {rule_turns} rounds.
No pointing for {rule_turns} rounds. If you point, take 2 sips.
Everyone must whisper for {rule_turns} rounds. Full volume = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, drink with your non-dominant hand. Wrong hand = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Drink with whatever hand you want.

prompts.text: {player1} picks a word. For {rule_turns} rounds, whoever says that word takes 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, you must do a 'That's what she said' after every statement someone makes. Miss one = 1 sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: That's what she said... one last time. Rule over.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, anyone who laughs takes 1 sip. Try to make people laugh.
Everyone must end sentences with 'unlike my love life' for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Your love life is no longer a punchline. For now.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, before every sip you must pause and look at an imaginary camera like you're in The Office. Skip it = 1 sip.
Everyone must do a Seinfeld bass riff ('bum bum bum ba-da-dum') after any awkward moment for {rule_turns} rounds. Miss it = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, you can only communicate using sitcom quotes. Original thoughts = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must say 'Cool cool cool cool cool' (Brooklyn Nine-Nine style) after every answer. Skip it = 1 sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, every time someone drinks they must deliver a fake confession to camera. Skip it = extra sip.
